entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A C4 cereal crop used to identify genetic elements of C4 photosynthesis

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A C3 crop targeted for the engineering of C4 photosynthetic traits

entities.name: C4 PHOTOSYNTHETIC TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics of the C4 photosynthetic pathway to be engineered into C3 plants

entities.name: C3 PLANTS
entities.description: Plants that utilize the C3 photosynthetic pathway

entities.name: C4 PHOTOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: A highly efficient photosynthetic pathway found in certain plants

entities.name: EMS MUTAGENESIS
entities.description: A method using ethyl methanesulfonate to induce random mutations in plants

entities.name: STABLE CARBON ISOTOPE RATIO
entities.description: A trait (δ13C) used to distinguish between C3 and C4 photosynthetic pathways

entities.name: MUT33
entities.description: A sorghum mutant characterized by low δ13C, pale phenotype, and stunted growth

entities.name: PALE PHENOTYPE
entities.description: A visual trait observed in the Mut33 sorghum mutant

entities.name: STUNTED GROWTH
entities.description: A growth-related trait observed in the Mut33 sorghum mutant

entities.name: 13C UPTAKE CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of a plant to incorporate carbon-13, which is decreased in the Mut33 mutant

entities.name: BACK-CROSSING
entities.description: A breeding method used to reduce genetic noise from random mutations

entities.name: GAS EXCHANGE MEASUREMENTS
entities.description: A method used to analyze CO2 compensation points and photosynthesis rates

entities.name: CO2 COMPENSATION POINT
entities.description: A trait measuring the CO2 concentration where uptake equals release

entities.name: MAXIMUM RATE OF PHOTOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: A trait measuring the peak efficiency of the photosynthetic process

entities.name: ILLUMINA PLATFORM
entities.description: A high-throughput sequencing method used to identify SNPs

entities.name: SNPS
entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphisms used as genetic markers to locate the causal mutation

entities.name: CHROMOSOME 10
entities.description: The genomic location containing the locus associated with the low δ13C trait
